context.brief_excerpt:
P1 BUG FIX: scheduler pre-gate violates no-pregate doctrine — all crons stuck.

CONTEXT: 15:10 AEST 2 May 2026, Day 2 of 72h autonomous window. Scheduler poller has been silent since 13:43 AEST (~1h27min) because `isSessionBusy()` at src/services/schedulerPollerService.js line 218-222 returns true persistently. The conductor's OS session has been alive since 2026-05-01T06:17 (22h+); session.status="streaming" is set on every turn and never resets between turns, so every scheduler tick sees bus

CONTEXT: 16:22 AEST 2 May 2026. Tate in Africa (off-grid autonomous window) just SMSed: "Users can't see the metro morning event if they haven't registered for it on th newest 1.7 of th app. Can you try see if it's supabase problem, or if I have to revert to a previous build."
